description: This buckaroo men Vez Brown Sandal is the essence of the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe is the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing and rivets. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to subtly recapture the masculine style of the Wild West. Upper Wide criss-cross fabric and leather straps for durability and comfort Leather toe holder for more comfort and moisture-absorption Firm footbed for extra support in all-day wear Branding on footbed Outsole Durable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for enhanced grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
